title: Unlock the Power of Subitem Pro Template app🏆

posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, everyone!

Exciting news – our Subitem Pro Templates app has reached an impressive 4.4K active users!

If you haven’t dived in yet, Subitem Pro Templates is a revolutionary tool for efficiently managing items and subitems on Monday.com. Let me give you a brief overview:

  • Effortlessly deploy subitem templates with just a click, either through automations or manually from the item view.
  • Choose the privacy settings that suit you – keep templates private or share them with your team members.
  • Enjoy the flexibility of having your templates available across all items and boards.
  • Organize your workflow more effectively with the ability to reorder subitems within your templates.

Ready to streamline your project management? Here is a video on explaining how it works: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

b-lab Team

posts.author: SigAlisa (Alisa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Can you edit the template and does that change take effect across all boards where the template is used? Thank you!

posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Alisa! Yes, you can change the templates and the change will immediately take effect to all the boards you used it. @SigAlisa

posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml: You are welcome! Please don’t hesitate to contact me for any issue or if you need help with the set up. Thank you @SigAlisa
